signup.title: Create an account
signup.success: Account created. Check your email to confirm.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: Enter your email. We'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.success: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent. Check your inbox.

reset.title: New password
reset.success: Password reset. You can now sign in.

errors.passwordWeak: Password too weak (min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 number)
errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in.
errors.resetLinkInvalid: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
